info.title: RainViewer Weather Maps API
info.description: Weather radar data API by RainViewer. Provides past 2 hours of weather radar data with 10-minute intervals as map tiles. Suitable for displaying in applications, websites, or mapping software. Available for personal and educational use only.

get.summary: Get available weather radar map frames
get.description: Returns the list of available weather radar frames from the past 2 hours with 10-minute intervals. The response includes the host URL and paths for constructing tile URLs.

200.description: List of available weather radar frames.

WeatherMapsResponse.description: Root response object for the weather maps API.

generated.description: Unix timestamp (UTC) when this API file was generated. Useful for checking for updates.

host.description: Host and protocol for the tile images. Use this as the base URL for constructing tile requests.

past.description: Past weather radar frames. 2 hours with 10-minute steps.

time.description: Frame generation date as Unix timestamp (UTC). Used for display and sorting.

path.description: Base path for the tile images of this frame. Contains a hash identifier. Use as-is when constructing tile URLs: {host}{path}/{size}/{z}/{x}/{y}/{color}/{smooth}_{snow}.png

TileParameters.description: Documentation of tile URL parameters. Tiles are fetched from the tilecache host, not this API directly. URL format: {host}{path}/{size}/{z}/{x}/{y}/{color}/{smooth}_{snow}.png

smooth.description: Blur (1) or not (0) the radar data.

snow.description: Display (1) or not (0) snow in separate colors.
